steps.title: Identify the student's explicit goal
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize the distance covered. The notes provide: sixty-two miles long. This detail is the key signal to look for in the choices.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choice
steps.content: Choice A uses sixty-two-mile-long as a compound adjective, making the distance a defining feature of the description. The other three choices either highlight different information from the notes (the private status, the construction dates, or the historic designation) or omit the measurement entirely. That matches choice A — A is correct.
